blended.narrative: Caberfae Peaks is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 809 ft. Looking ahead, 30 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.
